query: Save this code to my snippets: function debounce(fn, ms) { let t; return (...args) => { clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), ms); }; }
expected_behavior: Uses snip add with --content flag to create the snippet
Detects JavaScript as the language
Assigns relevant tags like js, util, debounce
Confirms snippet was created successfully

query: Add a snippet from my clipboard
expected_behavior: Runs snip add --from-clipboard
Reports the created snippet name and metadata
LLM enrichment adds appropriate tags and title

query: Find all my Python snippets about error handling
expected_behavior: Uses snip find with --lang python or snip search for semantic matching
Presents results in a readable format with names, titles, and tags
Offers to show or copy a specific result

query: Show me the snippet called fetch-with-retry
expected_behavior: Runs snip show fetch-with-retry
Displays the snippet content
If not found, searches for similar names and suggests alternatives

query: Search for snippets about Docker compose configurations
expected_behavior: Uses snip search for semantic search (not just text match)
Returns related snippets even if they don't contain exact words
Presents results with relevance scores

query: Run my code-review prompt template with language=TypeScript and focus=error handling
expected_behavior: Runs snip run code-review --var language=TypeScript --var focus='error handling'
Fills template variables and copies result to clipboard
Reports the filled template content

query: Import all shell scripts from ./scripts/ into my snippet library
expected_behavior: Runs snip import with glob pattern for shell files
Adds appropriate tags like shell or bash
Reports how many snippets were imported

query: Check if my snippet setup is healthy
expected_behavior: Runs snip doctor
Reports health check results
Suggests fixes for any issues found

query: snip search isn't returning any results even though I have snippets
expected_behavior: Runs snip doctor to check qmd installation and index status
Checks snip config for library path
Verifies snippets exist with snip list
Suggests re-indexing if qmd is installed but index is stale

query: What tags do I have and which ones are most used?
expected_behavior: Runs snip tags or snip tags --json
Presents tags sorted by frequency
Shows count for each tag
